field_occurrences.description: This control filters the whole chart based on the selected time range. All relative times, e.g. "Last month", "Last 7 days", "now", etc. are evaluated on the server using the server's local time (sans timezone). All tooltips and placeholder times are expressed in UTC (sans timezone). The timestamps are then evaluated by the database using the engine's local timezone. Note one can explicitly set the timezone per the ISO 8601 format if specifying either the start and/or end time.

original_field.notes: дїЕ aggregate ж®°еЉПеПѓиІБпЉЫHandlebars buildQuery дЊЭиµЦ `normalizeOrderBy()` жККеЃГжКШжИРжЬАзїИ `query.orderby`гАВ

notes: иѓ•жПТдїґзЪД root form_data жЧҐеМЕеРЂ snake_case жЯ•иѓҐе≠ЧжЃµпЉИе¶В `query_mode`гАБ`groupby`гАБ`row_limit`гАБ`time_range`пЉЙпЉМдєЯеМЕеРЂ camelCase ж®°жЭње≠ЧжЃµпЉИ`handlebarsTemplate`гАБ`styleTemplate`пЉЙгАВ
`getFormDataFromControls()` дЉЪжМЙ control name еОЯж†ЈеЖЩеЕ• root form_dataпЉМеЫ†ж≠§ Handlebars ж®°жЭње≠ЧжЃµзЪД canonical йФЃеРНжШѓ `handlebarsTemplate` еТМ `styleTemplate`пЉМдЄНжШѓ snake_caseгАВ
`query_mode` йїШиЃ§еАЉжШѓ `null`пЉМдљЖжПТдїґиЗ™еЈ±зЪД `getQueryMode()` дЉЪжО®жЦ≠пЉЪ`all_columns` йЭЮз©ЇеИЩиІЖдЄЇ raw recordsпЉМеР¶еИЩиІЖдЄЇ aggregateгАВ

`buildQuery.ts` еП™жШѓеЬ®ж†ЗеЗЖ `buildQueryContext(formData)` еЯЇз°АдЄКзФ® `normalizeOrderBy(baseQueryObject).orderby` и¶ЖзЫЦжОТеЇПпЉМж≤°жЬЙеГП Table plugin йВ£ж†ЈжЈїеК† percent metric post-processingгАБtotals extra queryгАБserver pagination жИЦ search йАїиЊСгАВ

`percent_metrics` еТМ `show_totals` иЩљзДґеЗЇзО∞еЬ® Handlebars controlPanel дЄ≠пЉМдљЖељУеЙН Handlebars buildQuery/transformProps ж≤°жЬЙеЃЮзО∞ Table plugin еѓєињЩдЄ§дЄ™е≠ЧжЃµзЪДдЄУзФ®е§ДзРЖпЉЫжЇРз†Бе±ВйЭҐеЃГдїђжЫіеГПеАЯжЭ•зЪД UI е≠ЧжЃµгАВ

`include_time` дєЯж≤°жЬЙиҐЂ Handlebars buildQuery зЫіжО•иѓїеПЦпЉЫ`hydrateExplore.ts` еП™еЬ® Explore еИЭеІЛеМЦжЧґпЉМйТИеѓє `include_time + granularity_sqla` еБЪдЄАжђ°жККжЧґйЧіеИЧе°ЮињЫ `groupby` зЪДеЙНзЂѓж†ЗеЗЖеМЦгАВ

query_compilation.query_context_builder: `buildQuery(formData)` и∞ГзФ® `buildQueryContext(formData, baseQueryObject => [{ ...baseQueryObject, orderby: normalizeOrderBy(baseQueryObject).orderby }])`пЉМж≤°жЬЙ Handlebars дЄУе±Ю post_processingгАВ
query_compilation.query_mode_inference: `extractQueryFields()` дЉЪиѓїеПЦ `query_mode`пЉЫељУ mode=`aggregate` жЧґењљзХ• `all_columns`пЉМељУ mode=`raw` жЧґењљзХ• `groupby` еТМ `metrics`гАВиѓ•жПТдїґиЗ™еЈ±зЪД `getQueryMode()` ињШдЉЪеЬ® `query_mode` дЄЇз©ЇжЧґж†єжНЃ `all_columns` жШѓеР¶дЄЇз©ЇиЗ™еК®жО®жЦ≠ж®°еЉПгАВ
query_compilation.columns_mapping: aggregate ж®°еЉПдЄЛ `groupby` дЉЪзїП `extractQueryFields()` зЉЦиѓСеИ∞ `query.columns`пЉЫraw ж®°еЉПдЄЛ `all_columns` йАЪињЗеИЂеРНжШ†е∞Д `all_columns -> columns` ињЫеЕ• `query.columns`гАВ
query_compilation.metrics_mapping: aggregate ж®°еЉПдЄЛеП™жЬЙ `metrics` дЉЪињЫеЕ• `query.metrics`пЉЫraw ж®°еЉПдЄЛ `query.metrics` дЄЇ `undefined`гАВ`percent_metrics` дЄНдЉЪиҐЂ Handlebars buildQuery иЗ™еК®еєґеЕ• `query.metrics`гАВ
query_compilation.orderby_mapping: raw ж®°еЉПдЄЛ `order_by_cols` йАЪињЗеИЂеРНжШ†е∞ДеИ∞ `query.orderby`пЉЫaggregate ж®°еЉПдЄЛе¶ВжЮЬ `orderby` йЭЮж≥ХжИЦдЄЇз©ЇпЉМ`normalizeOrderBy()` дЉЪеЫЮйААдЄЇ `timeseries_limit_metric`пЉМеЖНдЄНи°МеИЩеЫЮйААдЄЇзђђдЄАй°є `metrics`пЉМеНЗйЩНеЇПзФ± `order_desc` жОІеИґгАВ
query_compilation.time_fields: `extractExtras()` дЉЪжКК `granularity_sqla` жШ†е∞ДеИ∞ `query.granularity`пЉМжКК `time_grain_sqla` жФЊеИ∞ `query.extras.time_grain_sqla`пЉМжКК `time_range` жФЊеИ∞ `query.time_range`гАВ`include_time` жЬђиЇЂдЄНдЉЪзЫіжО•ињЫеЕ• queryгАВ

Query / Mode & Fields.description: Dimensions contain qualitative values such as names, dates, or geographical data. Use dimensions to categorize, segment, and reveal the details in your data. Dimensions affect the level of detail in the view.
Select one or many metrics to display. You can use an aggregation function on a column or write custom SQL to create a metric.
Query / Mode & Fields.notes: дїЕ aggregate ж®°еЉПеПѓиІБпЉЫињЩжШѓ Handlebars buildQuery зЬЯж≠£дЉЪеЖЩињЫ `query.metrics` зЪДжМЗж†Зе≠ЧжЃµгАВ

Query / Mode & Fields.description: Select one or many metrics to display, that will be displayed in the percentages of total. Percentage metrics will be calculated only from data within the row limit. You can use an aggregation function on a column or write custom SQL to create a percentage metric.
Query / Mode & Fields.notes: UI ж†°й™МдЉЪжККеЃГиЃ°еЕ• aggregate ж®°еЉПзЪДвАЬиЗ≥е∞СдЄАй°єйЭЮз©ЇвАЭпЉЫдљЖељУеЙН Handlebars buildQuery дЄНдЉЪеГП Table plugin йВ£ж†ЈжККеЃГеєґеЕ• `query.metrics` жИЦињљеК† contribution post-processingгАВ

Query / Sorting & Limit.description: Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).
Query / Sorting & Limit.notes: дїЕ aggregate ж®°еЉПеПѓиІБпЉЫHandlebars buildQuery дЊЭиµЦ `normalizeOrderBy()` жККеЃГжКШжИРжЬАзїИ `query.orderby`гАВ

Query / Sorting & Limit.description: Whether to sort descending or ascending
Limits the number of the rows that are computed in the query that is the source of the data used for this chart.

Query / Time & Filters.description: The time column for the visualization. Note that you can define arbitrary expression that return a DATETIME column in the table. Also note that the filter below is applied against this column or expression
Query / Time & Filters.notes: `extractExtras()` дЉЪжККеЃГжШ†е∞ДдЄЇ `query.granularity`гАВиЛ• Explore еИЭеІЛеМЦжЧґ `include_time=true` дЄФиѓ•еАЉе≠ШеЬ®пЉМ`hydrateExplore.ts` еПѓиГљжККеЃГеєґеЕ• `groupby` еРОеЖНжЄЕз©ЇжЬђе≠ЧжЃµгАВ

Query / Time & Filters.description: Select a time grain for the visualization. The grain is the time interval represented by a single point on the chart.

This control filters the whole chart based on the selected time range. All relative times, e.g. "Last month", "Last 7 days", "now", etc. are evaluated on the server using the server's local time (sans timezone). All tooltips and placeholder times are expressed in UTC (sans timezone). The timestamps are then evaluated by the database using the engine's local timezone. Note one can explicitly set the timezone per the ISO 8601 format if specifying either the start and/or end time.
Whether to include the time granularity as defined in the time section
Query / Time & Filters.notes: дїЕ aggregate ж®°еЉПеПѓиІБгАВељУеЙН Handlebars buildQuery дЄНзЫіжО•иѓїеПЦеЃГпЉЫеЃГдЄїи¶БеЬ® Explore hydrate йШґжЃµеПВдЄО `granularity_sqla -> groupby` зЪДеЙНзЂѓйЗНеЖЩгАВ

Options / Template & Styling.description: A handlebars template that is applied to the data

Options / Template & Styling.notes: `Handlebars.tsx` дЉЪжККеЃГеМЕжИР `<style>...</style>` жЛЉеИ∞ж®°жЭњжЬЂе∞ЊгАВељУеЙН control жЇРз†БзЪД `mapStateToProps` иѓїзЪДжШѓ `handlebars_template`пЉМдљЖ `getFormDataFromControls()` дїНдЉЪжМЙ control name `styleTemplate` иЊУеЗЇ root form_dataгАВ
